description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a staging job that runs on runners tagged "staging", executes a before_script to cd into the automation directory, then runs ansible-playbook playbooks/deploy.yaml --tags update, sleeps 15 seconds, and performs netq check bgp, netq check evpn, and netq check mtu. In the deploy stage add a production job that runs on runners tagged "production" and performs the same before_script and script sequence. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
